chunks.text: My family and I went to the sea.
The sea was blue and beautiful.
The sun was bright, and there were no clouds in the sky.
My brother was very good at swimming.
He went into the water many times, and he was very happy.
My sister and I were on the beach.
For lunch, we had bread and fish that my mother made.
In the evening, we were a little tired, but our hearts were very full.
